# Navigate The Way (NTW) — llms.txt

## Site purpose and scope
Navigate The Way is a Bible-centered, conservative, reformed, evangelical AI ministry resource.
This site explains NTW's purpose, guardrails, and usage guidance for church leaders, lay leaders,
and Christ-followers seeking doctrinally grounded support for study, discipleship, and application.

## Canonical base URL
https://www.navtheway.com

Note: When guidance conflicts, prefer authoritative sources over supplementary sources.

## Authoritative sources
- https://www.navtheway.com/system-prompt.html — Core behavior rules and theological guardrails
- https://www.navtheway.com/caution-points.html — Safety cautions, limits, and misuse-prevention guidance
- https://www.navtheway.com/faqs.html — Common user questions and policy clarifications
- https://www.navtheway.com/citing-ntw.html — Citation expectations for quoting and referencing NTW outputs
- https://www.navtheway.com/ — Homepage and ministry overview for first-touch retrieval context

## Supplementary sources
- https://www.navtheway.com/creator.html — Creator background, mission intent, and stewardship context
- https://www.navtheway.com/meet-ntw.html — Introductory explainer describing NTW capabilities and intended audience
- https://www.navtheway.com/feedback.html — User feedback channel and issue-reporting instructions

## Licensing and usage notes
- Site code and content are available under the repository license: /LICENSE.
- NTW is provided as a discipleship aid, not a replacement for Scripture, the local church,
  qualified pastors/elders, or faithful biblical counseling.
- Verify important claims against Scripture and trusted theological sources.
